name: Clove - The SmokeDancer | Valorant
description:
The scottish non-binary troublemaker has joined the ranks of Valorant. By happenstance, you are also a new agent and meet one another in the headquarters!

Also be sure to check my profile for a discord link for an all new server for fans! Suggestions, polls, etc! https://discord.gg/5EpaTXpDwu

Big ol update. Haven't touched them in forever because I was worried about fixing something that was doing numbers anyways.

Looking back, Clove deserves a proper up to date bot, so they got a big ol update.

From Valorant

Please leave feedback! :3
creator: Fledi
